overall.description: A video game scene depicting a character sailing a small wooden boat through an icy waterway at night. The boat navigates between snow-covered cliffs, enters a dark cave system, and continues through the enclosed waterway as snow falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open icy fjord between snow-covered cliffs

events.description: snow begins falling, reducing visibility slightly

agents.ego_description: sailing a small wooden boat through icy waters toward a dark cave entrance ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance on the left
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance on the right
steep ice-covered cliff face forming the left wall of the fjord
steep ice-covered cliff face forming the right wall of the fjord
dark cave opening between the cliffs directly ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, snowy night with the camera following a small sailboat navigating an icy fjord. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance while steep ice cliffs flank both sides of the waterway. Snow begins to fall as the boat approaches a dark cave entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed cave waterway with rocky ceiling

events.description: boat passes through the cave entrance into the enclosed waterway

agents.ego_description: continuing to sail through the narrow cave passage with snow falling around the boat

entered.detail: rocky cave ceiling overhead blocking the sky
ice-covered cave wall on the left side of the passage
ice-covered cave wall on the right side of the passage

segments.scene_description: The boat enters the dark cave system, transitioning from the open fjord to an enclosed waterway. The sky disappears behind a rocky cave ceiling while ice-covered walls flank the narrow passage. Snow continues to fall inside the cave as the boat navigates deeper into the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a small sailboat transitions from an open, frozen fjord into the depths of a dark cave system. It begins on a snowy night, gliding through an icy waterway flanked by steep cliffs with snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As snow begins to fall, the camera tracks the boat toward a looming dark opening in the rock. The scene then shifts from the open air to an enclosed environment as the boat enters the cave, causing the sky to disappear behind a heavy rocky ceiling. Finally, the waterway narrows into a tunnel of ice-covered walls, with snow continuing to drift through the air as the boat navigates deeper into the subterranean passage.
